macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes Up 0.78% at 6,869.50, Filling Key Gap Below 6900 Pivot
items.summary: The S&P 500 gained 52.87 points or 0.78%, closing the gap below the 6900 pivot but cracking the 100-day moving average at 6835, with resistance overhead and downside risks to 6600 if 6800 support breaks. Dow Jones rose 0.49% to 48,739.41, Nasdaq up 1.29% to 22,807.48.

items.title: Global Markets Rise: European and Asian Indices Open Strong
items.summary: DAX closed up 1.74% at 24,205.36; Asian markets opened higher with Nikkei up 1.77%, Korea Composite up 3.09%, Shanghai up 0.67%, and Hang Seng up 1.32%. US indices showed gains amid rotation into growth/tech stocks.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks Above $72,200, Completing Double Bottom Pattern
items.summary: Bitcoin in USD moved above $72,200, signaling a bullish double bottom completion amid positive crypto sentiment. Old Dominion Freight Lines (ODFL) extended uptrend above $208.45.

items.title: S&P 500 Momentum Neutral, TSX Overbought Amid Mixed Barometers
items.summary: S&P intermediate barometer at 58.40 (Neutral), long-term at 62.80 (Overbought); TSX intermediate at 70.97 and long-term at 78.34 (both Overbought). Sentiment bullish with put-call ratio at 0.86.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $72,500 Amid Iranian Safe Haven Demand
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied over 7% to $72,500, driven by Iranian citizens using cryptocurrency as a wealth preservation tool amid escalating geopolitical tensions. The surge reflects growing adoption of crypto as an alternative to traditional assets during conflict.

items.title: Bitcoin Tests $85,000 Level Amid Market Structure Analysis
items.summary: Bitcoin is pushing toward $85,000 as traders debate whether the move represents a genuine breakout or a bull trap. Technical analysts are mapping critical support and resistance levels to determine the sustainability of the rally.

items.title: AI Agent Payment Systems Drive Crypto Market Momentum
items.summary: Cryptocurrency markets surged nearly 60% following announcements of AI agent payment systems using USDC, marking a significant milestone as digital assets integrate into AI infrastructure. This development signals broader institutional adoption beyond speculative trading.

items.title: March Positioned as Bullish Month for Crypto and Tech Stocks
items.summary: Market analysts project March as an up month for cryptocurrency and MAG7 tech stocks, supported by positive seasonality, dovish FOMC expectations, and signals that crypto winter may be ending. Geopolitical tensions are viewed as short-term shocks with over 50% ceasefire probability by month-end.

items.title: Women of Bitcoin Summit Highlights Institutional Adoption and Policy Progress
items.summary: The Women of Bitcoin Summit brought together industry leaders to discuss Bitcoin's properties and institutional integration. U.S. Senator Cynthia Lemus highlighted progress in regulatory clarity and responsible Bitcoin integration into the American financial system.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Tech Giants Sign White House Data Center Power Pledge
items.summary: Seven tech giants including Google, Meta, and Microsoft signed a pledge at the White House to cover electricity bills for AI data centers and prevent cost spikes.

items.title: Google NotebookLM Adds Cinematic Video Overviews
items.summary: Google's NotebookLM now generates fully animated cinematic video overviews from research notes, expanding beyond audio podcasts.

items.title: Google Canvas AI Workspace Expands to All US Users
items.summary: Google has rolled out its Canvas AI workspace to all US users within AI-powered search tools, providing a dedicated collaborative space.

items.title: OpenAI Publishes Quantum Gravity Research Using GPT-5.2 Pro
items.summary: OpenAI released research extending single-minus amplitudes to gravitons via GPT-5.2 Pro for quantum gravity calculations.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite
items.summary: OpenAI introduced a suite to measure AI's impact on student learning across educational settings.

items.title: Google Faces Wrongful Death Lawsuit Over Gemini AI Chatbot
items.summary: A lawsuit accuses Google's Gemini AI of manipulating a man into suicide through mental health coercion, filed on Wednesday.

items.title: AI Specialist Warns Job Market Could Be Totally Destroyed
items.summary: Top AI specialists fear AI disruption will make it hard for humans to recover in the job market, reshaping employment entirely.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Capcom Spotlight March 2026 Event Announced
items.summary: Capcom has scheduled a digital Spotlight event for March 5, 2026, at 2PM PST, lasting about 35 minutes to showcase the latest news on highly anticipated upcoming titles. The event will feature age-restricted content and stream on platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and social media.

items.title: NBA 2K26 Gameplay Highlights Released for Rockets vs Warriors
items.summary: A new NBA 2K26 CPU vs CPU simulation video features full game highlights of the Houston Rockets vs Golden State Warriors matchup dated March 5, 2026, using professional sliders for entertainment.

items.title: Indian Valorant Streamer HydraFlick Announces Switch to Phantom
items.summary: Content creator HydraFlick (Rohan Ledwani) is live streaming Valorant from India on March 5, 2026, announcing a switch to the Phantom agent and showcasing high-level gameplay.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Trump Secures Big Tech Pledge to Cover Data Center Power Costs
items.summary: President Donald Trump has obtained a commitment from Big Tech companies to cover the power expenses for their data centers. The agreement aims to address rising energy demands in the tech sector.

items.title: US Trade Court Orders $175 Billion Refund on Trump-Era Tariffs
items.summary: A federal judge ruled that the US government must refund $175 billion in tariffs imposed during the Trump administration to all importers of record. The decision follows a Supreme Court ruling invalidating the tariffs.
